    Publications

    Pre-print publications under peer review

    NA

    Note that not all of these will appear in peer review with the same titles as found there, as often even the title of a paper can change as a result of the peer review process.

    Publications

    • Fitzgerald, M. C., Saelzler, U. G., & Panizzon, M. S. (2021). Sex Differences in Migraine: A Twin Study. Frontiers in Pain Research, 2, 113. (paper)
    • Fitzgerald, M., Pritschet, L., Santander, T., Grafton, S. T., & Jacobs, E. G. (2020). Cerebellar network organization across the human menstrual cycle. Scientific reports, 10(1), 20732. (paper)

    Posters and Presentations

    • American Headache Society. ‘Mechanisms of Sex Differences in Migraine: A Twin Study – The need to consider sex as a variable of interest’. June 2022.
    • Organization for the Study of Sex Differences. ‘Hormonal Mechanisms of Sex Differences in Migraine’. May 2020.
